name: @milady/plugin-limitless
description: Limitless Exchange prediction market trading plugin for Milady — discover markets, place orders, and run autonomous trading strategies on Base chain

LIMITLESS_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Hex private key for the wallet used to trade on Limitless Exchange (Base chain). Required for order signing and execution.

LIMITLESS_API_KEY.description: API key for the Limitless Exchange API (lmts_... format).

LIMITLESS_DRY_RUN.description: Set to 'true' to simulate trades without executing. Defaults to 'true' for safety.

LIMITLESS_MAX_SINGLE_TRADE_USD.description: Maximum USD amount per single trade. Defaults to 10.

LIMITLESS_MAX_TOTAL_EXPOSURE_USD.description: Maximum total USD exposure across all positions. Defaults to 50.

COINGECKO_API_KEY.description: CoinGecko API key for price feeds (optional, used by signal-sniper strategy).
